title: Gooey Biryani Muffins
description: A twist on traditional biryani, these gooey muffins are perfect as a breakfast or snack

ingredients.name: Gooey biryani spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at Indian grocery stores or online

instructions: Line a 12-cup muffin tin with paper liners.
In a large bowl, whisk together muffin mix, biryani spice blend, and salt.
Add milk, eggs, and vegetable oil to the dry ingredients. Stir until just combined.
Divide the batter evenly among the muffin cups.
Bake for 18-20 minutes, or until the muffins are golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Allow the muffins to cool in the tin for 5 minutes, then transfer them to a wire rack to cool completely.
